source_name: Alliance for Securing Democracy (German Marshall Fund)
text: The PAP cyberattack was most likely perpetrated by a Kremlin-affiliated actor. The fake article stated Prime Minister Donald Tusk would mobilize 200,000 Poles both ex-military and regular civilians to join the fight in Ukraine by July 1. The incident is situated within a broader series of Russian disinformation and cyber operations targeting Poland as a key supporter of Ukraine and aimed at influencing voters ahead of the European elections.
attribution_coding_note: Think-tank assessment: the attack was 'most likely perpetrated by a Kremlin-affiliated actor' within a series of Russian operations.
